name: lieflat-html-design
description: HTML design skill collection with presentation decks, Xiaohongshu longform cards, and Xiaohongshu cover templates.

scripts.list: npm run list:deck && npm run list:longform && npm run list:cover
scripts.audit: npm run audit:deck && npm run audit:longform && npm run audit:cover
scripts.preview:capture: npm run preview:capture:zh && npm run preview:capture:en
scripts.preview:capture:longform: for f in skills/lieflat-xhs-longform/assets/templates/xhs-*/zh.html; do id=$(basename $(dirname "$f")); node skills/lieflat-xhs-longform/scripts/capture-xhs-card.mjs --html "$f" --out "previews/zh/$id.png"; done
scripts.preview:capture:cover: for f in skills/lieflat-xhs-cover/assets/templates/xhs-cover-*/zh.html; do id=$(basename $(dirname "$f")); node skills/lieflat-xhs-cover/scripts/capture-xhs-card.mjs --html "$f" --out "previews/zh/$id.png"; done
scripts.preview:capture:xhs: npm run preview:capture:longform && npm run preview:capture:cover
